listedAppraisers.description: HEMPHILL opened as a commercial gallery in September 1993. The exhibition schedule features contemporary art ranging in media from emerging to mid-career artists.

listedAppraisers.name: Warwick Art Advisory
listedAppraisers.description: Warwick Art Advisory is a full-service consulting firm providing appraisals and consulting on acquisition, divestiture, and management of fine art, antiques, and furnishings. The dedicated team develops long-term relationships with individuals and institutions to prepare USPAP compliant art appraisals and manage comprehensive art collections.

listedAppraisers.name: Washington Fine Art Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Our team of certified appraisers brings decades of expertise to art valuation. We specialize in both traditional and contemporary art forms.

listedAppraisers.name: Watergate Gallery & Frame Design
listedAppraisers.description: Watergate Gallery & Frame Design was established in 1986. The gallery was expanded in 2005 offering a beautiful display area for artists. Provides art appraisal services.

listedAppraisers.name: Zenith Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Since 1978, Zenith Gallery has brought together the work from a wide variety of different artists. The gallery showcases a range of different pieces including paintings and sculptures.
